features.text: Added ETH Student Card (Legi) quick access directly from the navigation bar
Added new Protein and Balanced highlight filters to instantly find top macro picks

improvements: Implemented instantaneous client-side navigation for zero-delay restaurant switching
Significantly improved app performance with aggressive API caching
Redesigned empty states with a cleaner look and fun icons
Refined the Menu Detail UI with a more discrete close button
Disabled rubberbanding in the Menu Detail view for a native-feeling scroll on iOS
Cleaned up dead code and internal architecture
fixes: Fixed an issue causing UZH meal images to crash the app
Corrected nutrition labels to dynamically show 'per serving' for UZH and 'per 100g' for ETH
Fixed an issue where the iOS home screen icon wouldn't display correctly

changes: Greatly enhanced performance on the web, and especially on mobile via PWA
Added a new diagram view for nutritional information
Enhanced the menu item view design
Fixed the initial loading delay for favorite restaurants
Improved UI responsiveness on iOS devices
Improved the layout and functionality of the weekly menu view
knownIssues: Data synchronization is not yet functional
Vertical scrolling in the weekly menu encounters issues on desktop browsers
